## Summary

- explain the change in plain language
- note the affected area or workflow

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run -s check`
- [ ] manual verification for the changed workflow

## Privacy Review

- [ ] no secrets, tokens, or private local data are included
- [ ] no `runtime/` snapshot, `.env` content, or personal media is included

## Notes

- mention follow-up work, limitations, or rollout concerns if needed
